part1.question: How often do you use technology?
part1.followUp: What device do you use most frequently?

part1.question: Is there any technology you used to use but no longer do?
part1.followUp: Why did you stop using it?

part1.question: How has technology changed your daily life?
part1.followUp: Do you think people rely too much on technology?

part1.question: What new technology do you find most exciting?
part1.followUp: Is there any technology you would like to try?

part2.cueCard: Describe some technology that you decided to stop using.
bulletPoints: when and why you started using it
why you decided to stop using it
and explain how your life has changed since you stopped using it

questions: Do you think people are becoming too dependent on technology?
What older technologies are making a comeback?
How can people reduce their screen time?
Is it better to adopt new technology quickly or wait?
